summary: Implemented the light-blue global theme tokens, updated phone/WhatsApp numbers in centralized content, ensured Hero/Contact CTAs use sanitized `tel:` and `wa.me` links, and introduced a reusable BrandMark component used in both header and footer to display the new 3D block-style branding image with the tagline.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add at least 2 new gallery images depicting washing machines to `galleryImages` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` with appropriate English alt text, and ensure they render in the Gallery grid.
missing_requirements.reason: The `galleryImages` array is truncated in the diff and the visible entries do not show any washing-machine-specific items or the required new image filenames. Because the relevant portion is not present, there is insufficient direct evidence in the diff content that at least two washing-machine images were added to `galleryImages` with suitable alt text.
